control.note: The mark_fidelity pair has a known answer by PROVENANCE: B is a geometric transform of the reference asset, A is the model's independent re-drawing. Not pixel identity — B is 0.00% bit-exact vs the reference after warping. It calibrates the human rater the same way it calibrated the VLM judge (S8), so the two are directly comparable.

limitations: n = 1 rater, 3 pairs, 6 comparisons. This is a sanity check, not a study.
The rater is the author and is not blind to the project's hypothesis, only to which side each condition is on. A disinterested rater would be better.
Reported as a tie whenever the two orderings disagree — same rule as the VLM judge.
